# Nikhil Pahan - Technical Product Designer

Nikhil Pahan is a Technical Product Designer specializing in B2B SaaS, AI interfaces, and high-conversion e-commerce. He bridges the gap between design and engineering, utilizing AI-assisted development workflows (prompt engineering) to build high-fidelity, production-ready prototypes.

## Key Projects

### CaudateAI
- Role: Product Designer
- Type: B2B AI Analytics SaaS
- Description: Designed an intent-driven, no-code AI platform that translates natural language questions into KPIs and dashboards without requiring SQL. Focused on "Logic Visibility" to minimize AI hallucination risks.

### Visual ETL Data Pipeline
- Role: Product Designer
- Type: Enterprise Data Tooling
- Description: Architected a node-based visual ETL interface, reducing a manual 15-step data preparation workflow into 5 intuitive steps. Integrated AI-assisted data cleanup.

### Attavita
- Role: Lead Product Designer
- Type: D2C E-commerce (Shopify)
- Description: Engineered a progressive disclosure architecture and a high-conversion funnel for a novel health product. Bridged design and frontend execution using AI-assisted coding.

## Core Skills
- Design: UX/UI Design, Product Design, Interaction Design, Systems Thinking, Information Architecture.
- Technical: React.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Framer Motion, AI-Assisted Prototyping, Prompt Engineering.
